name: genswarms
description: Operate and extend GenSwarms, the Elixir/OTP runtime for directed swarms of subzeroclaw agents.

interface.shortDescription: Operate and extend Elixir/OTP agent swarms
interface.longDescription: Use GenSwarms to define, run, observe, and extend directed swarms of subzeroclaw agents with pluggable backends, topology routing, per-agent skills, objects, daemon coordination, and a Phoenix API.
defaultPrompt: Use GenSwarms to set up a local agent swarm.
Help me design a GenSwarms topology.
Help me add a backend or object to GenSwarms.
